qa_pairs.question: How do users connect to a MariaDB/MySQL database instance within the Cloud-based Database as a Service (DBaaS) environment?
qa_pairs.answer: Users must connect to their MariaDB/MySQL instance in the Cloud-based Database as a Service (DBaaS) using an SSL connection. An example connection command is `mysql --ssl -h dbaas101.arbutus.cloud.computecanada.ca -u user01 -p dbinstance`.

qa_pairs.question: What occurs if a user attempts a plain text connection to a MariaDB/MySQL database instance in the Cloud-based Database as a Service (DBaaS)?
qa_pairs.answer: If a user attempts a plain text connection to a MariaDB/MySQL database instance in the Cloud-based Database as a Service (DBaaS), their authentication will fail, resulting in an "Access denied" error.
